entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea, the host plant affected by A. flavus

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: Fungal pathogen that causes aflatoxin contamination in peanuts

entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: Food safety issue caused by A. flavus infection in peanuts

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: Host plant ability to resist fungal infection and reduce aflatoxin levels

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: Breeding approach using resistance-linked markers for varietal development

entities.name: GENETIC LINKAGE MAPS
entities.description: High-density maps constructed using SNP loci to identify QTLs

entities.name: SNP
entities.description: Single Nucleotide Polymorphism loci used for constructing genetic linkage maps

entities.name: QTL
entities.description: Quantitative Trait Loci associated with specific traits

entities.name: QRAF-3-1
entities.description: A quantitative trait locus located on chromosome A03 linked to A. flavus resistance

entities.name: QRAF-14-1
entities.description: A quantitative trait locus located on chromosome B04 linked to A. flavus resistance

entities.name: CHROMOSOME A03
entities.description: The specific chromosome where QTL qRAF-3-1 is located

entities.name: CHROMOSOME B04
entities.description: The specific chromosome where QTL qRAF-14-1 is located

entities.name: REFERENCE GENOME
entities.description: The genomic sequence used to determine the physical distance of mapped QTLs

entities.name: RPP13
entities.description: Putative disease resistance RPP13-like protein 1 candidate gene

entities.name: LOX
entities.description: Lipoxygenase candidate gene for resistance to A. flavus

entities.name: WRKY
entities.description: WRKY transcription factor candidate gene

entities.name: CYTOCHROME P450 71B34
entities.description: Candidate gene identified for A. flavus resistance

entities.name: MICROARRAY ANALYSIS
entities.description: Technique used to identify genes responding to A. flavus infection

entities.name: PENTATRICOPEPTIDE REPEAT-CONTAINING-LIKE PROTEIN
entities.description: Gene responding to A. flavus infection and potential candidate for resistance

entities.name: MOLECULAR BREEDING
entities.description: Programs for deploying validated genes to improve resistance in peanuts
